title: Set default map zoom to ~30nm viewport

plan.summary: Extract the default map zoom level into a single `DEFAULT_ZOOM` constant at the top of sailing-weather.js, set it to 11 (~30nm viewport), and replace all 3 hardcoded zoom values with that constant. This makes future zoom adjustments a one-line change.

steps.description: Update sailing-weather.js: add a `const DEFAULT_ZOOM = 11;` near the top of the file, then replace the hardcoded zoom values in initMap(), handleGetLocation(), and tryGeolocation() with `DEFAULT_ZOOM`.
